programme.title: On the Case: Justice for Angie
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from her bus stop, a nine-day search reveals that her terrifying abduction has ended in a heartbreaking homicide. As police mount a tireless search to find her killer, the community rallies together to get justice for Angie.

programme.title: On the Case: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A new father comes home to find his infant son and wife missing. Four months later their bodies are found in a remote wooded area. When police investigate the father's past they find the reason for the unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Secret Meeting
programme.desc: After a teenager mysteriously disappears, police must determine if a secret meeting with a young man led to her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: An Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A son discovers his mother's violent murder and police must track down the killer who committed a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case: A Different Time
programme.desc: When Barbara Rowan left her house on an afternoon in 1984, she had a baseball mitt, a ball and a radio. Barbara claimed she was on her way to meet her coach. After she didn't return home, Police discovered that the teenager didn't play any sports.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood Money
programme.desc: After 21 years, DNA analysis of a blood-stained dollar bill helps to solve the murder of gas station clerk Bradley Perry.

programme.title: On the Case: Footsteps in the Dark
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman's is murdered in a dark parking lot. Did she know her killer or was she the victim of a deadly predator?

programme.title: On the Case: A Blue Raincoat
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears on her way home from school, police find her blue raincoat thirty miles away. It marks the beginning of a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: Final Words
programme.desc: A devoted mother returns home from work and finds her 17-year-old daughter has been murdered. Was her killer the mysterious boyfriend she had written about in her journal?

programme.title: On the Case: Scattered Clues, Shattered Lives
programme.desc: January 10th 1984. A frigid morning when pilot Ron Holm arrived home from a long flight. As Ron pulled into his Aurora Colorado driveway, he was puzzled to see that the garage door was open and his girlfriend purse was on the ground.

programme.title: On the Case: Cry on My Shoulder
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears, police zero in on her violent ex-boyfriend. But the secret to solving the case is buried in a cold case file.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Call
programme.desc: When bartender Anita Andrews is stabbed to death inside her family's bar, police conclude her killer was the last patron she served that night.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Night Before Murder
programme.desc: The keys June 19th, 1987. It was a Friday night in Lake Worth, Florida when Dana Fader left for a night out with her sister. Hours later, Officer Barbara Hopper made a grim discovery inside Dana's 1980 Ford Fairmont. Dana's lifeless body

programme.title: On the Case: Last Dance
programme.desc: A woman's walk home from a night out at a dance club ends in a brutal murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears, a series of text messages from her phone lead police to believe she left on her own. Then, her family uncovers evidence that she may have actually been the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Christina's Story
programme.desc: When a young girl vanishes while walking her dog on a military base, it marks the beginning of a missing persons case that would capture the hearts of the entire county.

programme.title: On the Case: A Test of Patience
programme.desc: The unsolved murder of a teenager torments a small midwestern city for decades until a relentless team of investigators finally finds the clue that breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Carnage
programme.desc: When 25 year old Laci Hill vanishes without a trace; police receive the key to solving the mystery from her kidnapper's wife.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Fast-food workers in clown costumes chase the Sliders to a resort where Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) is traumatized by a sadistic, virtual reality Civil War game.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After being dumped in the middle of the Pacific ocean, the Sliders are rescued by a merchant ship populated by a band of pirates.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders must pull off the heist of a precious gem that they need to fix their malfunctioning timer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders discover Los Angeles under a desert and Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) is worshipped as an ancient deity.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An energy barrier threatens to consume everything in its path as the Sliders rush to prevent Mallory (Robert Floyd) from being transformed into their nemesis, Dr. Geiger (guest star Peter Jurasik).

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 2.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders race to find the cure for a deadly plague that is consuming the inhabitants of that dimension. Guest stars: Yee Jee Tso, James Bell. With Jerry O'Connell and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders must find a solution amid the chaos when they land on an Earth in jeopardy of being destroyed by a meteor. Guest stars Gerry Narin and Jason Gaffney. With Sabrina Lloyd.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade and Rembrandt (Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) are treated as gods when the Sliders land on an Earth where free love and thinking still exists. Guest star: Jason Gaffney.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on an Earth where being intelligent is more popular than being a famous athlete. Guest stars William B. Davis, Karen Austin and Gabrielle Rose. With John Rhys-Davies.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The travelers slide to a world where Rembrandt "Crying Man" Brown is as huge as Elvis in our world, but after a mysterious "death" eight years ago, this world has had to make do with "Crying Man" impersonators.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders travel to a parallel dimension, which at first glance seems like paradise. Money is given to play the lottery, streets are quiet... it's life in the slow lane and very pleasant.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: On a world where males have been rendered impotent, females eager to repopulate greet the male Sliders as "love gods.''

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Trapped and separated from the other Sliders, Quinn finds himself on an astral plane where only a young girl named Gillian can see or hear him.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn is mistaken for a gunslinger in a world where the code of the Wild West still prevails.
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad, and the Wealthy

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The vengeful and vicious El Sid follows the sliders to a world where San Francisco is a prison facility.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: A world that seems to mirror the previous world the Sliders encountered gives Wade the chance to prevent a series of murders.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn leaves the safety of a cave and faces a man-eating allosaurus in an attempt to retrieve the timer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.
programme.sub-title: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen

programme.title: Killer Britain: Lewis Daynes
programme.desc: Breck Bednar was a loving, family-oriented 14-year-old who had lots of friends and excelled at school. But he was also seduced by the world of online gaming. He didn’t see the dangers when an older teen made lucrative job offers.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Peter Morgan
programme.desc: Millionaire Peter Morgan moved a young mother, Georgina Symonds, into one of his properties, paying her thousands a month to be his ‘girlfriend’. But when the relationship turned sour, he began plotting his revenge.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Kentucky Hills
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers called 911 to report that she had killed her boyfriend in self-defense after he attacked her. But investigators soon learned he was planning a date with another woman, and alleged Shayna killed him in a jealous rage.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In Wisconsin Field
programme.desc: When Nicole, a young teacher, was found shot to death in a Wisconsin farm field, police arrested her live-in boyfriend who had waited 18 hours to report her missing. But later, a stranger Nicole met at a concert in a local bar became a prime suspect.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Cheerleader On Trial
programme.desc: Ashamed of a pregnancy out of wedlock and fearful of her parents' reaction, high school senior Skylar Richardson told no one of her condition. But when a newborn’s body was found buried in the family’s backyard, Skylar was charged with murder.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Killing Momma
programme.desc: The story of Gypsy Lee Blanchard. Confined to a wheelchair and lavished with gifts from charities, everything changed when her mother was found dead and Gypsy vanished.

programme.title: Killer Town: Sioux Falls, SD
programme.desc: Investigators hunt a sexual sadist who stalks and preys on young mothers in Sioux Falls

programme.title: Killer Town: Jackson, MI
programme.desc: A young police officer follows his gut instincts to discover the macabre secret hidden in a friendly neighbourhood restaurant.

programme.title: Killer Town: Eldorado, IL
programme.desc: When a revered small-town physician lies about his whereabouts the night of his son’s murder, police investigate the death of another son seven years earlier.

programme.title: Killer Town: Dry Prong, LA
programme.desc: When a quiet bachelor lets a mysterious woman into his life, the results are disastrous for both him and his family.

programme.title: Killer Town: Nashville, MI
programme.desc: Authorities find themselves at a standstill when a lack of evidence, motives, and suspects threatens to derail the investigation into the brutal killing of Rodney Fancher.

programme.title: Killer Town: Oakley, KS
programme.desc: Alice Pepperl is found dead in her motel room, and a missing quarter is the only way to connect her to her killer.

programme.title: Killer Town: Layland, WV
programme.desc: James Duncan’s family searches for him, but the atrocities of his murder are soon revealed and they are as shocking as who is behind his brutal death.

programme.title: Killer Town: Brandon, MB
programme.desc: When Erin Chorney disappears without a trace, investigators go to exceptional lengths to discover her whereabouts.

programme.title: Killer Town: Gormania, WV
programme.desc: Cathy Ford goes missing one fateful night and no one knows why, but a burnt car and blood soaked trailer might uncover the truth.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: While many UFO sightings occur in rural locations with only a single eyewitness, there have been sightings over cities witnessed by hundreds.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Countdown To Disclosure: Evidence suggests the world's governments could be on the verge of announcing everything they know about UFOs. What will this mean for our society?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception: Check out mind-reading plants, pagan human sacrifice and Californian time travellers.
programme.sub-title: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: A mysterious creature washed up on a Newfoundland beach, an animal attacking with its claws in New Delhi, and a winged beast haunting Virginia.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: A Peruvian doctor finds carvings that could rewrite the history of evolution and an ancient wooden model reveals an intriguing secret.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On 13 March 1997 in the night sky over Phoenix, Arizona one of the most spectacular mass UFO sighting of all time took place. Thousands witnessed bright orange orbs moving in formation. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Pentagon
programme.desc: The US government officially recognise UFOs, calling them Unidentified Aerial Phenomena. In this episode Craig and Sarah take on the US Navy UAP videos. They speak to an ex-MOD official, Nick Pope. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Stephenville
programme.desc: In this gripping episode, Craig and Sarah take on the Stephenville UFO case. They scrutinise all available evidence, talk to key eyewitnesses and grill experts before arriving at a final verdict. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Glacier Mummy
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a U.S. Army soldier. In Alaska, strange bundles of canvas and wood high up on a mountain are discovered. Volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital WWII weather station is uncovered.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Ancient Oland Island Massacre
programme.desc: On a Swedish island, archaeologists discover a grisly site. The wreckage of an American Navy plane is located in a surprising place. Finnish farmers unearth something shocking. A baby mammoth found in the permafrost is studied.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series investigates curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Buried Secrets Of Mount Cook
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Siberia's Frozen Necropolis
programme.desc: Researchers find a mummy buried in a strange way. A legendary polar exploration vehicle goes missing in Antarctica. A glacier cave on Mt. St. Helens is explored. An island in the Bering Sea may contain clues to the extinction of the woolly mammoth.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Riddle Of Whale Bone Alley
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Close Encounters
programme.desc: There is no safe place. Every day, all around the world, in the most ordinary places, regular people are spotting UFOs.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Abductions
programme.desc: These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Mass Sightings
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next?

programme.title: Moesha: I Love Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha is once again rejected from her friends’ band, we enter a black and white parody of I LOVE LUCY wherein Lucy (Moesha) tries to get into Ricky’s show.

programme.title: Moesha: Home Is Where The Car Is
programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Car Is

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.
programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Moesha: Mis-Directed Study
programme.desc: Moesha is flying high after she gets a job tutoring one of the basketball team’s star players until she finds out what kind of game he really wants to play.

programme.title: Moesha: Not My Pumpkin
programme.desc: Things get tense at the Mitchell house when Frank discovers Moesha has been taking birth control pills – and he’s the last to know.

programme.title: Moesha: Just Above My Head
programme.desc: Moesha finds her history teacher’s remarks racially offensive, but fears that confronting him might affect her grade and cost Niecy her scholarship.

programme.title: Moesha: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste
programme.desc: A well-intentioned Moesha intervenes to try and stop her once-popular hangout, The Den, from being sold to a commercial developer, unaware that Andell stands to make a great deal of money on its sale.
programme.sub-title: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste

programme.title: Moesha: Isn’t She Lovely?
programme.desc: Hakeem and Moesha’s friendship takes an interesting turn after he surprises her with an expensive necklace to wear to a homecoming dance she’s attending with someone else.

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest
programme.desc: Dorian pulls an illegal scam involving Frank’s credit card and makes matters worse by lying about it, behavior that could have dramatic consequences.

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With Dee sick in bed with a bad cold, Moesha offers to prepare the Thanksgiving feast but finds herself engaged in a fierce cooking competition with Hakeem’s mother.

programme.title: Moesha: To Sleep – Perchance To Dream
programme.desc: Moesha starts having recurring romantic dreams about Hakeem, giving her second thoughts about their friendship and about sharing a room with him and Niecy on an upcoming ski trip.

programme.title: Moesha: He Doth Protest Too Much
programme.desc: Moesha discovers that some of her college classes are more difficult than she thought; she has a hard time in Chemistry and reluctantly agrees to let Niecy tutor her.

programme.title: Moesha: Let’s Talk About Sex
programme.desc: Moesha crashes in Niecy’s dorm room after a late-night Pendulum party and is horrified to discover that Nicey has also let a male sleep in the room.

programme.title: Moesha: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The arrival of Frank’s Aunt Hattie brings a shocking revelation about Frank that turns the rest of the family – especially Dorian and Moesha – against him.

programme.title: Moesha: Color Him Father
programme.desc: Still reeling from the news that Frank is Dorian’s biological father, the Mitchells prepare for Dorian’s 17th birthday bash, a party that grows more and more elaborate and expensive as Dorian takes full advantage of Frank’s guilt.

programme.title: Moesha: Family Affair
programme.desc: Still angry at Frank for keeping his true relationship to Dorian a secret for so long, Moesha decides not to introduce her father at an upcoming 'Businessman of the Year' awards banquet.

programme.title: Moesha: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Hoping to boost the confidence of her new roommate, Theresa, Moesha asks Hakeem’s good-looking friend to ask Theresa on a date – but can’t leave well enough alone when the date is a success.

programme.title: Moesha: Gimme A Break
programme.desc: Moesha, Niecy, and Hakeem go to Santa Barbara for Spring Break. A campus rival spreads false information that Mo is 'easy' when her ex-boyfriend shows interest in Moesha.

programme.title: Moesha: Something About Moesha
programme.desc: Having been neighbors and friends nearly all their lives, Moesha and Hakeem wonder if there is more to their relationship.

programme.title: Moesha: The Robbing Hood
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem explore their evolving dating relationship. Dorian visits Moesha on campus and Moesha sees this as a chance to forge a sister/brother relationship; items begin missing from dorm rooms and all clues lead towards Dorian.

programme.title: Moesha: Arriving Right On Q
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship hits a snag when Q returns to town; sparks fly between Moesha and Q; Q invites Moesha to spend the summer (as a road manager) on tour with his rap group.

programme.title: Moesha: D-Money Loses His Patience
programme.desc: Hakeem tries to convince Moesha to pass on Q’s offer to go on the road with his band, and focus on her priorities: school, family, and him. Moesha admits to being too distracted to make a clear decision.

programme.title: Moesha: On The Rebound
programme.desc: Moesha and Q decide whether or not to take their relationship to the next level; Dorian returns home from boot camp.

programme.title: Moesha: Bad Company
programme.desc: After spending the summer traveling with Q’s band, Moesha returns home sporting an engagement ring.

programme.title: Moesha: Netcam
programme.desc: Someone places a hidden camera in Moesha and Niecy’s dorm room; Myles’ girlfriend tells him she’s pregnant—and he’s the father!

programme.title: Moesha: Living In Paradise
programme.desc: Moesha tries to straighten out her out-of-control roommates, but they’re more interested in chasing Boys II Men.

programme.title: Moesha: You Say He's Just A Friend
programme.desc: Moesha is tempted by her attraction to good-looking Jamal, while Dorian starts up his own hair solon.
programme.sub-title: You Say He's Just A Friend

programme.title: Moesha: Just The Two of Us
programme.desc: While Frank and Dorian are on a road trip to Vegas, Myles falls hard for Moesha’s roommate, Alicia.

programme.title: Moesha: The Nutty Moesha
programme.desc: It’s Halloween and Moesha’s acting crazy, Niecy’s growing body hair, and Dorian’s dogsitting a ferocious bulldog.

programme.title: Moesha: The Candidate
programme.desc: A woman city council candidate loses Moesha’s support when she gets the hots for Hakeem.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: St Albans
programme.desc: Searching in prime commuter territory where property isn't cheap. Both couples have high expectations for their first homes and our duo will need all of their property know-how to come out on top!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil's challenge is to find two very different properties in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Chelmsford
programme.desc: Location, Location, Location is off to Chelmsford this week to solve the property problems of two couples at opposite ends of the budget scale.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Berkshire Revisits
programme.desc: Our two couples are at a similar stage in their lives, looking to buy their first homes together. Each had set their sights on pricey patches in the costly capital, but did they really know what they wanted and where they wanted it?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Guildford
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey on a quest to find dream homes for two sets of frustrated house hunters. Two very different budgets and briefs but with the property market raging it looks like they've taken on double the trouble.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East England
programme.desc: One family is stuck in a house bursting at the seams and the other is stuck in one room at mum and dads. It's a quest for space-and it's up to Kirstie and Phil to make these searches blast off.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sutton Coldfield
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are kicking-off the series with one hell of a challenge, they're in Birmingham, house hunting for three generations of one family… one big house, for one big, extended family.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week we've been called in to help a lucky couple that have just scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and want to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: SW London
programme.desc: Even in the midst of the credit crunch, there are still some people who are buying, so this week Kirstie and Phil are in desirable south west London to find two very different properties.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Southside
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are searching in South London with three essential workers who need all the help they can get. They're all new to the area, have very modest budgets, and want to find their dream first homes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tufnell Park
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil almost come to blows when they take on the impossible – finding a flat with private parking in pricey North London for £290,000. They're helping Laura Cream, a very single-minded young lady.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tees Valley
programme.desc: First-time parents Nicola Moore and Tony Curry are desperate to find their first home where they can bring up 1-year-old son Lucas.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bucks & Herts
programme.desc: Buying a house can be romantic, but if you're not careful, things can quickly turn sour.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: East Midlands
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back and busier than ever, as they attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in an extremely challenging market.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Liverpool
programme.desc: Will Phil be the knight in shining armour to rescue these damsels in distress, and will Kirstie turn out to be Kate's property fairy godmother? Will they fail in their quest or find property success in Liverpool South?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tyne Valley
programme.desc: After a lot of hard saving, it's time for first time buyer fiancés', Kerry Ellis and Michael Byrne, to get on the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hackney
programme.desc: This week we're guiding two first time buyers through the property jungle that is East London. Rosie Evatt and Laura Coveney have been friends since childhood and are pooling their resources to buy their first property together.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Victory
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sideswiped
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: Focus
programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Reward
programme.desc: Blake fires the La Mirage manager for withholding crucial information regarding the fire; Alexis offers a reward for the arrest and conviction of the arsonist; Michael Culhane continues to romance Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Arraignment
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty: Romance
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Dex's plan to free Caress from prison succeed, as she returns to Denver with a fever for revenge; Sammy Jo is pregnant with Clay's baby and warns Steven no court would deny her custody of Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Choice
programme.desc: Caress vows retribution for her years of imprisonment; Michael Culhane uses Zach Powers to acquire thirty percent of "The Crater" project; Sammy Jo tells a distraught Clay of her pregnancy; Caress blackmails Emily Falimont.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Secret
programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Letter
programme.desc: A dying Emily begs Blake to use the letter she wrote to bring an end to Alexis and Ben's treachery; Clay and Sammy Jo are married, Nick Kimball relentlessly pursues Dominique's affections; Blake rejects Michael Culhane's efforts for a reconciliation.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Ball
programme.desc: Using Emily's letter, Blake devises a way to regain his empire; Sammy Jo learns she is not pregnant, but keeps it a secret from Clay; fearing Michael Culhane's deceitful intentions.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fear
programme.desc: Alexis relinquishes control of Denver-Carrington and the mansion back to Blake; Ben battles Alexis for equal control of Colbyco; Michael Culhane and Alexis form an alliance against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rig
programme.desc: Sammy Jo fears she will lose Clay if he learns about her false pregnancy; Adam discovers the identity of the mysterious woman tormenting Ben; An explosion rips through an oil rig, trapping Blake amidst raging flames, as Ben leaves him to die.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Love Remembered, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Ben returns to Blake's aid and pulls him to safety, both narrowly escaping the devastation of the ensuing explosion; Blake suffers memory loss due to the explosion; Alexis leads Blake to believe they have been married for the past twenty-three years.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Love Remembered, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Sammy Jo informs Clay of her desire for an annulment to their marriage; Domique is roughed-up by thugs threatening her to cooperate with their boss, as Gary Tilden coincidentally returns to Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Portrait
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Blake's once passionate feelings for Alexis may still be lingering; Blake and Ben reach a mutual reconciliation; Amanda disappears to London; Leslie Carrington finds Ben.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Birthday
programme.desc: Clay reluctantly signs the annulment papers to end his and Sammy Jo's marriage; Blake persuades leslie Carrington to stay in Denver and Ben a second chance; Adam proposes to Dana.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Test
programme.desc: Krystina lapses into unconsciousness, as doctors fight against time to bring her back; Krystle rebuffs Alexis' sincere concern for Krystina's health; Steven and Sammy Jo assume the appearance of a normal marriage for Danny's sake.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.123
programme.desc: Navy woman unaware of boyfriend's girlfriend loans $3,000 for car rims; man admits drunken stupor caused furniture damage.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.74
programme.desc: Young woman hit by car at underage drinking party blames icy driveway; driver claims she should have moved. Siblings fight over deceased father's home ownership, leading to a feud.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.188
programme.desc: A troubled teen is at the center of a dispute between a woman and her son-in-law’s daughter over the cost of two airplane tickets to Pittsburgh. A woman sues her son-in-law’s granddaughter for money loaned to buy a mobile home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.12
programme.desc: Woman sues ex for car payments, damages, unpaid tickets, and property return; he countersues for car value/Co-workers' horseplay leads to ruptured eye socket; they dispute damage responsibility.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.57
programme.desc: A father of four denies owing his ex-lover for bail after being arrested for violating a restraining order filed by his estranged wife/A tattoo artist demands that a former customer pay for the balance on an unfinished tattoo.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.232
programme.desc: A man accidentally crashes his date's car while teaching her to drive in the snow, leading to a lawsuit. Divorced parents dispute sharing the cost of their teenager's snowboarding camp trip.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.97
programme.desc: A woman accuses her ex-roommate-to-be of stealing her security deposit; she is countersued for rent and money owed/A 21st birthday celebration ends with a young woman allegedly wrapping a borrowed car around a pole.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.87
programme.desc: Man sues ex-wife and her girlfriend for allegedly stealing property; she claims he threatened her life. High school coach sues teenager for totaling motor scooter; teen argues it was his first solo scooter ride.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.138
programme.desc: Pit bull terrier attacks family in park; owner accused of intoxication and starting fight. Woman loans man thousands after rehab; he claims affair and gifts.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.225
programme.desc: A violent breakup leads ex-lovers to dispute damages from an assault, hotel fees, and destroyed property. Allegations of infidelity arise as a woman sues her ex-boyfriend for unpaid furniture, countered with claims of her ongoing relationship.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.150
programme.desc: Man denies owing ex and her mother for car down payment. Accuses ex-lover of sending inappropriate emails about sex to his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.248
programme.desc: A woman and her mother sue their former friend for furniture return; he claims they owe him a loan. Another woman sues her son's ex-friend's mother for car impound costs.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.134
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute $200,000+ debt, a pistol, and a high school ring as gifts or loans; jealousy involved. Woman and best friend's daughter-in-law disagree on eBay sales proceeds' whereabouts, one claims check was mailed.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.189
programme.desc: A handgun comes between a brother and sister who sue over the alleged destruction of property during a heated fight. Accusing his mother of losing his rightful inheritance, a man denies owing her for unpaid loans and car insurance payments.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.148
programme.desc: Jealousy leads to candlestick attack on ex's truck window. Teen sues friend for car damage; friend admits drinking led to incident.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.206
programme.desc: Furniture left out in the snow, an alleged campaign to ruin an ex- lover’s reputation, and an alleged assault in a car come into play when ex-lovers who met online call it quits.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.122
programme.desc: Woman and niece sue niece's ex-friend over wrecked Jeep Commander/injured woman sues for nude photos posted online/woman sues estranged daughter-in-law for loan to recover repossessed car.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.167
programme.desc: Woman claims ex-husband owes $16k in child support arrears; he sues for overpayment. Man sues alleged bar assailant; defendant claims Good Samaritan role.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.78
programme.desc: Woman sues ex-lover for $2,000 in bad checks; he claims fault lies elsewhere, some money intended for her move. Man disputes ex-fiancée over unpaid balance on engagement ring and jewelry; claims she has most of the valuables in question.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.104
programme.desc: Woman accuses fiancé of infidelity while she's in hospital; accused of car vandalism/Woman sues ex-friend for selling fridge she loaned him.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.259
programme.desc: A young tenant disputes custody of a band's equipment and unpaid rent with former landlords. Man sues seller and girlfriend for refund after alleged failed vehicle purchase from online ad.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.90
programme.desc: Man accuses ex-lover of stalking; she alleges he cheated with child's mother. She sues for unpaid bills. Woman claims ex-fiancé is volatile; he sues for stopped check payment and punitive damages, alleging fraud.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.132
programme.desc: Teen admits to inciting vandalism against aunt's boyfriend; blames schoolmates for egging his car/A 13-year-old denies giving friend unlimited iTunes access; father stuck with bill.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.20
programme.desc: Woman accuses ex of cheating in her home, he sues for furniture disposal and clothes destruction/Woman sues ex-roommate for back rent amid marijuana accusations, countersued for damaged property cost.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.234
programme.desc: A man's family visit turns sour as he and the child's mother argue over a hairbrush. High school friends living together feud over rent, bills, and a trip.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.229
programme.desc: A woman denies filing a retaliatory restraining order after finding her ex-fiancé with someone else; accused of kicking his bedroom door. Another woman sued for passing fraudulent check in secret-shopper scam.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.94
programme.desc: A single mother dips into her savings to bail an ex-boyfriend out of jail after he was arrested for not paying child support. /A woman sues her granddaughter for money she allegedly borrowed to pay for her prom.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.93
programme.desc: Man sues ex-girlfriend for car loan and carpet cleaner return; she alleges jealousy. Woman claims ex-lover's drug addiction led to eviction; he sues for furniture and electronic equipment return.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.218
programme.desc: A man is allegedly chased out of a bar and viciously attacked after being accused of stealing a woman’s purse. A man hits black ice and has a wreck in his brother’s ex-girlfriend’s car; she sues him for damages.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.121
programme.desc: 12-year-old allegedly vandalizes security system/Man sues ex for damaging home and clothes during break-in attempt. She admits to the damage, claims they're even now.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.127
programme.desc: 11-year-old girl accused of pouring scalding water on 5-year-old boy; mothers fight over liability and medical expenses/A man sues horse trainer for saddle return; granddaughter sold it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.182
programme.desc: A brutal catfight ensues after a teenager gossips about infidelities between her brother and her best girlfriend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.217
programme.desc: A woman's Disneyland trip after a concussion weakens her lost wages claim. Another woman discovers her fiancé's hidden child while he's incarcerated, leading to property disputes.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.50
programme.desc: Man alleges assault by ex-fiancée, sues for damages and unpaid loan for her schooling/Former live-in lover sues estranged husband for over $4,000 in personal loans and child support.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.89
programme.desc: Three teenagers conspire to steal 8,000 dollars from a senior citizen to buy new equipment for their band; one of the thieves is the woman’s own grandson/The proceeds from selling an engagement ring on eBay divides ex- lovers.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.55
programme.desc: Teen throws house party while dad's away; alleged damages to neighbor's car ensue. Young ex-lovers dispute alleged loan for body-piercing school. Woman sues body-piercing student ex-roommate for unpaid rent.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.117
programme.desc: Jealousy leads to assault and theft at golf course/Sued for damaging car, trip costs, and phone.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.105
programme.desc: Ex-friends dispute over money after unauthorized shower photos and drug possession arrest/Woman sues ex-friend for unpaid BMW balance; friend claims she donated car before paying off.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.40
programme.desc: Electrician denies vandalizing home, stealing materials post-firing. Expert witness called for damages/Woman sues ex for furniture return; he claims she gave it when moving out.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.115
programme.desc: Man accuses ex-lover of sending explicit photos/Sued for damaging ex-girlfriend's Mustang in accident.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.108
programme.desc: Woman accuses ex-boyfriend of coercing money and housing with suicide threats/Teens dispute sale of stolen car in hit-and-run.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.221
programme.desc: An 8-year-old boy calls his father after an argument with his mother, leading to a fight and damaged property. A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for stealing her quad runner and wrecking her car; he alleges harassment.
