programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In late 1976 and early 1977, female students at the University of California were terrorised by a grim series of lookalike murders. Acting out a sick fantasy, Thor Christiansen struck while they were hitchhiking.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Dubbed the `Vampire of Sacremento', Richard Chase murdered six people in the late 70s, engaging in necrophilia with his victims, and then bathing in their blood or eating their internal organs.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Was the heinous serial killer Herbert William Mullin driven by nature or nurture? Featuring a unique interview with the murderer himself.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Known as `the meanest man in America', Donald Henry Gaskins brutally tortured and killed over 100 people. And, even on Death Row, he managed to commit one final murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: After being convicted of attempted murder and kidnapping, David Carpenter went on to kill five women.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Are serial killers born with the tendency to commit their crimes, or is it learnt? Under the microscope is American Jeffrey Dahmer.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, Douglas Clark and Carol Bundy trawled Sunset Strip in Los Angeles looking for prey. Acting out their darkest desires, they left a trail of bloodshed in their wake. What motivated this string of sickening murders?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: When investigators in Maryland identified cross-dressing eccentric Hadden Clark as the killer of six-year-old Michelle Dorr and Harvard graduate Laura Houghteling, he not only confessed but claimed that he was also responsible for many other deaths.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the life and terrible crimes of Gary Ridgway. One of the US's most prolific serial killers, he had cops baffled for 20 years and killed so many women he lost count of his victims.
programme.sub-title: Gary Ridgway: The Green River Killer

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, the north of England was terrorised by a vicious criminal known as the Black Panther. Among hundreds of burglaries and armed robberies, several sub-postmasters were shot dead.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: An insight into Britain's most infamous female serial killer, Myra Hindley. Did something cause her to commit her crimes, or was she born to kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the `Highway Hooker', a female serial killer and prostitute sentenced to death by lethal injection for the killing of six men in Florida between 1989 and 1990.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists who tried to unravel the mystery of why so many young people fell under Manson's spell, and how he was able to convince them to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of Ted Bundy, who is believed to have sexually assaulted and bludgeoned to death up to 100 young women in the USA in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists try to profile Kenneth Bianchi and Angelo Buono.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at British killer Dennis Nilsen who was known to dress and watch TV with his victims' corpses. Having crammed human remains into his drains, his crimes were discovered by Dyno-Rod.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The concluding episode in this investigative series profiles Ivan Milat, the murderer of numerous backpackers in Australia in the 1990s. What led him to kill?

programme.title: Floods of Fear
programme.desc: Two inmates who have been put to work during a severe flood are washed away in the strong current, along with their guard. The trio find refuge in an isolated house partly engulfed with water but also containing a frightened woman.

programme.title: Seven Days to Noon
programme.desc: A leading atomic research scientist rebels and devises a way of ending a potential nuclear war by stealing an atomic bomb and announces that, unless all work on the atomic project stops, he'll detonate it in central London.

programme.title: The Ghost Train
programme.desc: High jinks and chills ensue when a group of people become stranded at an isolated station.

programme.title: Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Simon Sparrow begins medical school in London at St Swithin's Hospital, and moves into an apartment with roommates. A series of challenges and shenanigans takes place during their next five years at medical school.

programme.title: Doctor at Sea
programme.desc: A doctor tires of general practice and signs up to be a ship's doctor in an effort to bring some excitement into his life. Unfortunately, the cargo boat he joins is skippered by a formidable martinet captain and there are only two women on board.

programme.title: Doctor in Love
programme.desc: A doctor falls in love with a nurse while undergoing treatment at his own hospital. When his stand-in breaks his leg and is replaced by a female doctor, he falls for her as well.

programme.title: Raising the Wind
programme.desc: A group of students at an elite music school decide to share a flat in order to cut their living costs and have somewhere to practice together. They get into quite a few scraps and adventures, including impersonating a celebrity quintet.

programme.title: The Fast Lady
programme.desc: A dogmatic Scottish civil servant and enthusiastic cyclist becomes involved with a tycoon and his car-mad daughter.

programme.title: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: Four high profile personalities band together to bump off a tabloid magazine publisher who threatens to expose their dark secrets.

programme.title: The Divorce of Lady X
programme.desc: A barrister is named co-respondent in his client's divorce suit after lending her the overnight use of his hotel suite.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Family drama set in the 1930s about an inexperienced young veterinarian who joins a Yorkshire practice run by an eccentric vet.

programme.title: The Maury Show: You're a Gold Digger…My Man is Not Your Baby's Father!
programme.desc: Charlotte and Tasheun bonded over their children’s mutual father from a photo album, Brandon, but will the DNA test further confirm this? Then, will Tanya prove that her baby Craig III is the son of Craig Jr.?
programme.sub-title: You're a Gold Digger…My Man is Not Your Baby's Father!

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Slept With 4 Men… Who's The Father?
programme.desc: Ebony swears that Andre fathered her special needs daughter, but he denies it! Then, Jodi completely denies that he’s the father of Ashawnda’s baby! What will the DNA test results say?
programme.sub-title: I Slept With 4 Men… Who's The Father?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Brandon faces his childhood bully, his mother Shirley. Victoria transitions, seeks self-love through cosmetic changes. Aubree and Ava inspire bonding through dance.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Keyonna was just 15 years young when she had her daughter Keyarra. Motherhood was daunting for Keyonna, but she did her best to raise her daughter.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Ta'Laiya and De'Asia have been friends since the 7th grade and stopped speaking because of a damaged wig. De'Asia wants to rekindle their friendship but doesn't believe she's responsible for the damage to the wig.
programme.sub-title: Too Many People In This Relationship

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Shamika's video went viral after she caught her husband, Ifeanyi, at a hotel with another woman on their anniversary! The couple is here to see what, if anything, Karamo can do to salvage their marriage!

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Jeremiah and Nancy have been together for four years and have two children. They look like the picture-perfect family, but this couple is at war as accusations of cheating continue to surface. Jeremiah even questions whether their children are really his.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Trevor and his wife DeLessa are no strangers to the reality television world. But Trevor believes DeLessa has taken things too far and doesn't prioritize their family and relationship. DeLessa says being on social media is how she makes money.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Raven and Tony met online, and before you knew it, they were moving in together. But Tony believes that Raven is cheating and lying to him. He wants Raven to unlock her phone and prove her loyalty.
programme.sub-title: Unlock The Phone Has Shocking Surprise

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Tameeka met her boyfriend online and is ready to take the next step in their relationship. But her friends and family are trying to put the kibosh on things. Why? Her family members, Jenna and Angela, believe that Tameeka is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Jaylinn and Aaron learned that mixing love and work can be challenging. Jaylinn claims rumors about Aaron led to cheating, pregnancy, and even drug use. They come to unlock each other's phones to prove their innocence and love for each other!
programme.sub-title: Unlock the Phone: Is She Still Talking to her One-Night Stand?

programme.title: The Maury Show: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!
programme.sub-title: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiancé Cheat with Over 50 Women and My Best Friend?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, Don and Amy are back for another lie detector test! This time Don wants to know if Amy is sleeping with his brother! Will they ace their tests?
programme.sub-title: Did My Fiancé Cheat with Over 50 Women and My Best Friend?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested… Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!
programme.sub-title: 5 Men Tested… Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Wife Betray Me By Sleeping with My Son?
programme.desc: Romel, his wife Chanel and her sister Nakiya are back because he thinks Chanel is sleeping with his 21-year-old son Romel Jr. who’s dating Nakiya! Later, Reggie cheated on Teri 9 times, but does he actually have a sex addiction?
programme.sub-title: Did My Wife Betray Me By Sleeping with My Son?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!
programme.desc: They ran, they ranted...but what happened when they went home? Today, some past guests return for more tests! Plus the winner of Maury’s Future Stars 2013 will be announced.
programme.sub-title: Maury Guest Updates…I'm Back with a Secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese’s daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been here 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests!
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Miguel is suing his friend of 30 years because he believes the defendant is the cause of his dog's death.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Jennifer is accusing Michelle of causing the car crash and is suing her for the damages to her car.

programme.title: Medium: Means And Ends
programme.desc: Scanlon's haunting dreams of his late brother leave Allison concerned for her partner.

programme.title: Medium: How To Kill A Good Guy
programme.desc: Allison continues to find herself at odds with Scanlon when she thinks his late brother could be linked to a missing girl's murder.
programme.sub-title: How To Kill A Good Guy

programme.title: Medium: Talk To The Hand
programme.desc: After getting a skin graft on her hand, Allison is perplexed when the same hand starts moving with a mind of its own.

programme.title: Medium: Where Were You When..?
programme.desc: When Allison flashes to a specific time in the future, her fear grows as she begins to feel powerless to stop a catastrophic event from taking place.

programme.title: Medium: Native Tongue
programme.desc: Allison becomes suddenly unable to understand spoken language, developing a friendship with a linguist along the way.

programme.title: Medium: Smoke Damage
programme.desc: Allison's dreams of a blaze could help solve mysterious fire related deaths, and Devalos ponders the next step in his career.

programme.title: Medium: The People In Your Neighborhood
programme.desc: Allison's neighbors are furious when a convicted sex offender moves into the area, but Allison's visions have her questioning his guilt.

programme.title: Medium: Blood On The Tracks
programme.desc: When a man is killed by a train, Allison has a dream forewarning of an identical murder.

programme.title: Medium: Only Half Lucky
programme.desc: Allison becomes concerned when she discovers her brother's newfound success.

programme.title: Medium: Labor Pains
programme.desc: A desperate man pleads with Allison to help him find his missing wife.

programme.title: Medium: Me Without You
programme.desc: Allison and Joe begin new careers that take them in different directions.

programme.title: Medium: And Then
programme.desc: Now that Allison's special abilities have been revealed to the public, everyone's lives have been turned upside down.

programme.title: Medium: But For The Grace of God
programme.desc: Allison tries to help investigator Cynthia Keener find a missing teenage girl. Meanwhile, Ariel dreams of Allison's high school days from the '80s.
programme.sub-title: But For The Grace of God

programme.title: Medium: To Have And To Hold
programme.desc: Joe brings a reluctant Allison with him to a party at a prospective employer's house. Later on, the employer's daughter disappears, leading Allison to connect her recent dreams about Paris to the disappearance.

programme.title: Medium: Do You Hear What I Hear
programme.desc: A young deaf girl is kidnapped, causing Allison to completely lose her hearing. With Allison at a loss, Joe decides to help her and Cynthia Keener investigate the kidnapping.
programme.sub-title: Do You Hear What I Hear

programme.title: Medium: Girls Ain't Nothing But Trouble
programme.desc: Larry Watt, a defense attorney who has caused trouble in Allison's past, asks Allison to be a consultant for him. Low on money, Allison accepts his offer.

programme.title: Medium: Aftertaste
programme.desc: Devalos tries to reclaim the D.A.'s office. Allison's support of Devalos is tested when she has visions of Devalos' strongest political supporter involved in a horrible conspiracy.

programme.title: Medium: Burn, Baby Burn - Part 1
programme.desc: Joe's mother pays a surprise visit, which worries Allison because she hasn't seen her since her psychic abilities became public knowledge.

programme.title: Medium: Burn, Baby Burn - Part 2
programme.desc: Allison tries to find the link between Ariel's prediction of a classmate's mother's death, dreams related to her case with Cynthia, and Devalos' murder case.

programme.title: Medium: Wicked Game - Part 1
programme.desc: While working to locate a missing local girl, Allison learns about secrets from Cynthia Keener's past.

programme.desc: A tipper truck full of gravel rolls into a farmer's field.

programme.desc: A 44-tonne truck careers off the A1.

programme.desc: A 26-tonne bin lorry has fallen onto its side.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.
programme.sub-title: Son of Return of the Fly II

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Resting Place
programme.desc: While visiting their future burial plots, Appa and Umma make an unfortunate discovery. A faux fight between Jung and Kimchee is caught on video.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Sneak Attack
programme.desc: Appa and Umma learn that selling illegal face cream has a downside. Janet adopts an alternate identity to get into a film festival.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Silent Auction
programme.desc: In hopes of claiming a winning lotto ticket, Janet searches for a legal loophole. Jung has a tough talk with Shannon. Umma covets a fancy coat.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New TV
programme.desc: Kimchee tries to keep his new girlfriend from meeting Jung. Janet speaks her mind in class. Appa scores a new TV.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Janet struggles to keep her parents from learning about her relationship with Raj. Meanwhile, Jung and Kimchee plan a party.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Kim's Convenience gets a noisy new neighbor. Jung becomes smitten with a new co-worker. Gerald's new girlfriend rubs Janet the wrong way.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's First Text
programme.desc: Appa inherits his daughter's old smartphone. Umma finds a stray dog in the store. Janet and Kimchee bond over dim sum.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handy Graduation
programme.desc: At a party to celebrate getting his GED, Jung can't ignore his feelings for Shannon. Meanwhile, Janet grows tired of standing in her brother's shadow.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New Appa-liance
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Army Spoon
programme.desc: Gerald photographs Appa and his spoon for an exhibit. Janet's apology for a restaurant faux pas doesn't go well. Umma receives an alarming call.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Kim Cup
programme.desc: An old ping-pong table rekindles a rivalry between Appa and Jung. Umma sets out to bond with Janet but finds Chelsea to be more receptive.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanoon Delight
programme.desc: Appa's quest to retrieve his drill from Janet leads to an amorous encounter with Umma. Jung gives Kimchee unsolicited advice and plenty of it.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: To Him It May Concern
programme.desc: Following Appa's spelling error, Umma becomes the store sign maker. Kimchee's mom visits and Janet lands an internship for Gerald.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Blabber Talker
programme.desc: Appa and Umma search for an excuse to avoid vacationing with the Lees. Janet scores a lucrative but awkward photography gig.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Kimchee gets conflicting dating advice from Jung and Shannon. Janet's outraged when she learns that Umma's sold off her childhood keepsakes.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever

programme.sub-title: Bad Boy Blake With Abs Of Steel

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha & Danielle are angry with dad, Ron, who they say abandoned their dying mother, his wife of 30 yrs, to plan a wedding with a Kennedy heiress he met online. His daughters say "Misty Kennedy" is a catfish. Ron says "Misty" is the love of his life.
programme.sub-title: Dad Left Our Dying Mom For A Woman Who's A Kennedy Heir?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elsa says she was abused daily & beaten with ropes, chains, whips & umbrellas by the people she thought were her adoptive parents, Joe and his wife, Evangeline. Elsa says the abuse lasted for 19 years until an unlikely person stepped up to rescue her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues an incredible story of a woman brutally raped at age 15. Loretta identified the alleged rapist and helped police put him behind bars. But her world was rocked 14 years later when the man, Dean, was exonerated due to DNA evidence. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Could You Be An Eyewitness? Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The tense family drama continues. Dr. Phil sent Private Investigator Harold Copus thousands of miles through three countries including the jungles of Belize to find two sisters, Allene and Mollie, who were abducted by their father one year ago. Part 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.
programme.sub-title: The Pastor, His Wife, The Call Girl And The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every parent can tell you that raising a child is often demanding, thankless, hard work. But when a teenager gets pregnant and has a child, the result can be stress and chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.sub-title: Mother God's Followers And Alleged Victims Face Off Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.
programme.sub-title: Hoarding Ultimatum: Your Junk Or Me!

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil follows up with Charles and Tracy. After coming to the conclusion that his dream of being shared by his wife and mistress was never going to happen, did Charles follow through and end his relationship with the other woman? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Liar, Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his mission to end the silence on domestic violence. More than 25 percent of battered women remain in a relationship with their abuser. Sonya fears that she is one of those women who stay. Hear her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1
programme.sub-title: My Husband Thinks I Hacked Our Devices: Clear My Name Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.sub-title: Uncle Kevin Answers The Accusations Pt.2

programme.sub-title: Exclusive: The Co-Eds And The Catfish

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional Lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach - Bondi. Home of the weird, wonderful, beautiful, deadly and dangerous, join Australia’s favourite lifeguards on Bondi Rescue 24/7.

programme.title: JAG: Need to Know
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Harm serves as a judge and Mac is the contentious prosecutor in a case fraught withpolitical implications when an American aviator is charged with killing three Britishsoldiers during a flight mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: JAG: Shifting Sands
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG: déjà vu (AKA Soldier of Love)
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG: Desert Son
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: COPS: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes . A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: COPS: Cops What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS: Follow Me to the River
programme.desc: A deputy jumps into a waterway to arrest a fleeing suspect. Officers respond to roommates in an argument. Officers are called when two crossdressers attack a group of women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop leads to a foot chase, a driver found with meth narcs on his passenger who has warrants, and a 17-year-old is caught driving without a permit.

programme.title: COPS: Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no id bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A suspect runs from an illegal gambling game claiming shots were fired. A man is caught trespassing on school grounds. A male driver wearing a halter top is pulled over for a minor traffic violation.

programme.title: COPS: Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: COPS: Finding Fido
programme.desc: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A man is found pinned under his drunk friend's car.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Cookies and Contraband
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man apologizes profusely after leading an officer on a foot chase, a passenger in a car chase tells conflicting tales, and police find a wanted man on a roof.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.
programme.sub-title: Cops The Young and the Reckless

programme.title: COPS: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity
programme.desc: In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.
programme.sub-title: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.
programme.sub-title: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.
programme.sub-title: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found
programme.desc: A boy befriends a couple that recently lost its young son. A trainee schemes to steal Julie's job. A bickering married couple takes the cruise and stays in separate cabins...next door to each other.
programme.sub-title: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery
programme.desc: An advice columnist neglects her husband to devote all her time to her fans, prompting him to seek affection elsewhere. A man with a negative history with Capt. Stubing fills in for the ailing chef.
programme.sub-title: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, the captain worries about how to effectively lead his ship but be a friend to his crew as well. A married couple who outwardly appear happy and in love are both desperate for the other person to give them a divorce.
programme.sub-title: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters
programme.desc: A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters

programme.title: The Love Boat: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle
programme.desc: A woman who believes her departed dad was a noble sea captain forms an attachment for a devilish old purser; a newlywed couple are prevented by dislocated backs, sunburn, and even poison ivy from enjoying their honeymoon.
programme.sub-title: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time
programme.desc: Isaac's possessive mother becomes jealous of her son's lady friend, while he objects to his mom sharing a cabin with her latest boyfriend; a divorced comedy team is too busy making jokes to admit they miss each other.
programme.sub-title: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Millionaire superstars Roz and Bill (Michele Lee and Fernando Lamas) have remarried and are celebrating their newest honeymoon aboard the Pacific Princess in "Hollywood Royalty."
programme.sub-title: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson
programme.desc: A congressman unjustly accused of being involved in a scandal seeks refuge aboard the Pacific Princess; Isaac and a lovely intellectual snob clash over a colorful old passenger.
programme.sub-title: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Last Of The Stubings / Million Dollar Man / The Sisters
programme.desc: Stubing's nephew comes on board to train to be a seaman but doesn't do a good job at anything he does.
programme.sub-title: The Last Of The Stubings / Million Dollar Man / The Sisters

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Inspector / A Very Special Girl / Until The Last Goodbye
programme.desc: The crew, after being informed that an inspector from the line will coming on board to do a report on them, but not knowing who he is, tries to be extra nice to anyone whom they think is the inspector but always comes up wrong.
programme.sub-title: The Inspector / A Very Special Girl / Until The Last Goodbye

programme.title: The Love Boat: Computerman / Memories Of You / Parlez Vous?
programme.desc: A slick computer matchmaker proceeds to pair up cruise guests while setting himself up with Julie; two American gold-diggers pretend to be French; a New York advertising executive meets up with a long-lost love. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Computerman / Memories Of You / Parlez Vous?

programme.title: The Love Boat: Taking Sides / Going By The Book / A Friendly Little Game
programme.desc: An older couple's problems affect the marriage of newlyweds.
programme.sub-title: Taking Sides / Going By The Book / A Friendly Little Game

programme.title: The Love Boat: Parents Know Best / A Selfless Love / The Nubile Nurse
programme.desc: A couple takes their son on a cruise in an attempt to end his relationship with an unsuitable girl; a May-December couple rethinks their romance; an ex-showgirl's glamorous past jeopardizes her new career as a registered nurse. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Parents Know Best / A Selfless Love / The Nubile Nurse

programme.title: Melrose Place: Amanda Unplugged
programme.desc: A frightened Amanda gets plastered at the Shooters Halloween party and sleeps with Peter. Matt barely fails the medical school boards, but Michael changes his results so that he can gain entry.

programme.title: Melrose Place: El Syd
programme.desc: Jack dies following his tussle with Amanda. Sydney blackmails Amanda and Peter, demanding half of Amanda's share of the estate.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Free Kimmy
programme.desc: Alison and Hayley honeymoon at a luxurious hotel/resort in Cancun, which he owns. Jack's father orders his other son, Bobby, to "take care of" Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Kimberly Does L. A.
programme.desc: Kimberly's bed-hopping puts her life in danger when her latest conquest turns out to be Vic, a psychotic man who has made threatening calls to her radio show.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hook, Line and Hayley
programme.desc: Kimberly tells Peter that she is giving up her radio career to become a psychiatrist. Amanda suspects that Bobby is going to kill her, but he says he came to Los Angeles to protect her from his family.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Two Flew Over The Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Brooke blames Alison for Hayley's death and arranges for Alison to be taken in for questioning. Jake turns to a loan shark friend to cope with Shooters' crisis.
programme.sub-title: Two Flew Over The Cuckoo's Nest

programme.title: Melrose Place: Oy to the World
programme.desc: S04E015) Brooke learns that she is not really pregnant, but doesn't share the truth with Billy. When Jane monopolizes Michael's time, Sydney slips tranquilizers into her drink.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Holy Strokes
programme.desc: Jane has suffered a stroke and is left paralyzed on one side. Brooke asks Billy to meet her at the hospital and says that she has suffered a miscarriage.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Brooke Stops Here
programme.desc: Michael moves out after Sydney accosts him for trying to take advantage of Jane. Monty asks Jake to collect from another of his "customers" to pay off his interest, but Jake cannot go through with it.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Sydney, Bothered And Bewildered
programme.desc: Alison tries to show some sensitivity toward Brooke, who responds by trashing Alison's apartment. Michael agrees to come home from Peter's if Sydney can get Jane out of the beach house.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Bobby Trap
programme.desc: Vince is furious when he learns that Bobby did not kill Amanda. Michael injects Kimberly with truth serum and gets her to admit that Sydney drugged Jane.

programme.title: Melrose Place
programme.desc: Peter pays Syd to accompany him to a party and try to win Bobby away from Amanda. Sydney warns Bobby that Peter is out to destroy his relationship with Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Devil In a Wet Dress
programme.desc: Billy is haunted by nightmares about Brooke. Michael goes to great lengths to convince Kimberly to move back in with him.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Circle Of Strife
programme.desc: Kimberly is hurt when she receives divorce papers, although they had been filed months before her reconciliation with Michael. Sydney sues Michael and Peter for sexual harassment, and they are forced to appoint her office manager.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Run Billy Run
programme.desc: Amanda agrees to give Billy a raise if he can win a prestigious airline account. He sleeps with a rival executive to get her to reveal their strategy, then uses it to undermine them.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ruthless People
programme.desc: Billy continues to irritate Alison with his win-at-all-costs attitude and boorish behavior. A distraught Matt gets drunk and sleeps with his friend Dave.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Burning Sofa
programme.desc: Bobby is arrested for assaulting Peter, but Sydney later convinces Amanda to have the charges dropped. Peter makes a deal with Billy's client so that he can pay off Alycia and escape her influence.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Triumph Of The Bill
programme.desc: S04E026) Billy uses underhanded means to steal the keynote speech at an ad convention away from Alison. Claire has been hired by Richard to break up Jake and Jane.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina And The Pirates
programme.desc: Purchasing a fake ID in the Other Realm causes Sabrina’s magic to become fake as well.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mrs. Kraft
programme.desc: Mr. Kraft’s ex-wife returns to win him back, but Zelda isn’t going to let him go without a fight.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Teenage Writer
programme.desc: When typed on a magical typewriter, Sabrina’s spy story and its characters come to life.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem The Boy
programme.desc: Salem's return to human form is short-lived, thanks to Roland the Troll and Sabrina's unknowing wishes.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Long and Winding Short Cut
programme.desc: Sabrina is stripped of modern conveniences after using shortcuts to solve her family secret.
programme.sub-title: The Long and Winding Short Cut

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Sandman
programme.desc: Employed as a Sandman, Sabrina gets into trouble dropping into other people’s dreams.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Pen Pal
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers her new pen pal witch is wanted in two realms.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts travel to Hawaii for a family reunion, but when they arrive, Sabrina discovers that she will not be able to enjoy herself until she solves the family secret once and for all.
programme.sub-title: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Silent Movie
programme.desc: The Spellman house becomes the setting for a silent movie.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Real World
programme.desc: Sabrina becomes the unknowing star of an Other Realm TV show.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Big Sleep
programme.desc: A vengeful aunt uses magic poppies to put the Spellman household to sleep.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream A Little Dreama Me
programme.desc: Her Witches License and a new student bring Sabrina a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: No Place Like Home (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina’s senior year of high school gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jealousy
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey starts spending a lot of time with his best friend.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Prelude To A Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s new coffeehouse co-worker poses a threat to her relationship with Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Orphan Hilda
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Spoiled Rotten
programme.desc: New charge card from the Other Realm causes Sabrina to forget that the most important things in life can’t be bought.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully
programme.desc: Sabrina goes a little overboard in her attempt to seem more mature for the attentions of a college boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry
programme.desc: Paying the price for kissing Josh, Sabrina must adjust to life after Harvey.
programme.sub-title: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Now You See Her Now You Don’t
programme.desc: Adhering to a fad diet from the Other Realm, Sabrina becomes so thin she literally disappears.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Her Now You Don’t

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Super Hero
programme.desc: Childhood dreams come true when Sabrina casts a spell that turns Harvey into a superhero.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem’s Daughter
programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Bundt Friday

programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions turn bad when she uses her magic to meddle in other people's lives.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream Date

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans on the world's most challenging obstacle course; the new Piston Plunge obstacle makes its debut on the course which ends with the Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans on the world's most challenging obstacle course; the new Kickboards obstacle makes its debut on the course which ends with the Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where Minions have taken over the course and brought the new obstacle Despicaballs; other new obstacles include Shattered Panes and Final Frontier in addition to the iconic Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude in San Antonio with ninjas from across the country taking on the world's most challenging obstacle course; competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans in this first round of competition from the Alamodome.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals begin in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including, for the first time, Kaleidoscope, Ghost Town and Spin Zone; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals continue in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including new obstacles Hopscotch and Box Office. The two fastest ninjas face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals continue in Los Angeles where competing ninjas will face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including new obstacles Over Under and Flipped Around; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals conclude in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles. The two fastest ninjas face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass going into the National Finals.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals return to Las Vegas where the ninjas face up to eight super-sized obstacles in Stage 1. The ninjas must complete the course, including new obstacles Three Ring Circus and Tetherball, to advance to Stage 2 of the national finals.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals continue in Las Vegas where the ninjas face super-sized obstacles in Stages 1 and 2 in timed runs; the ninjas who advance to Stage 2 must complete a six-obstacle course, including new obstacle Hornet's Nest, to advance to Stage 3.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The national finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining competitors move on to stages 3 and 4 for their chance to win $1 million and become the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Unaware that they are under the influences of a powerful villain, Ladybug and Cat Noir are determined to get back to their lives as quickly as possible. They think everything is under control, but Shadow Moth prepares for his first big victory.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: A boy who transforms into a living toy-sized action figure recruits an unlikely team of toy heroes.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Axel is offered a new toy if he helps his uncle with a charity event the next day, but Axel can't hold out that long and sneaks into his uncle's store at night with the Power Players.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: While Axel plays with his friends in the park, the Pyrant pyramid makes a new appearance, determined to no longer control the minds of toys, but that of humans.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Uncle Andrew promises Axel that he will give him a toy if he helps him at a charity sale. Impatient and eager to pick out a toy, Axel descends into the store overnight.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Axel finds missing Bearbarian in the backyard, but his companion is now working with Orangutank.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Following one of Madcap's plans related to the powers of Minergy, Axel ends up in Madcap's body, while Madcap ends up in Action Axel's body.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Madcap awakens some video game robots. They do not seem aggressive, but their objective is to wreak havoc on the city.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Porcupunk and Dynamo have gotten their hands on Axel's phone, on which he has filmed himself transforming into a toy. A high-speed chase begins in the city streets that must be resolved before the whole world finds out about Axel's secret.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Someone finds a defeated Sarge Charge in the garden without his tracking binoculars. Axel does everything in his power to find out who committed the terrible acts that would make Sarge Charge sad.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Axel and Madcap are jealous of Luke because he is playing with a super-collector's robot, and now they both want it for themselves.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Galileo won't stop filming himself for his fans while Axel makes him recall every occasion when his lack of attention worked against him.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Tired of being a good boy everyone likes, Axel dreams of being shadowy lone wolf, which he thinks is way cooler.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Ronin wants to join the Power Players, but they're too busy playing with a remote-controlled car. All of the chaos does not go unnoticed by Madcap.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: While Axel would like to grow up to be taken more seriously, MadCap creates a huge body that allows him to gain immeasurable strength. The Power Players seem destitute in the face of this immense threat.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Super Axel will try anything and everything to defeat Madcap who has become a giant who is far too powerful. Super Axel has to see what would happen if he asks Uncle André for a little help.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: When Dynamo bonds the trio together, Sarge and Masko get into an argument about what's more important for battle and Axel gets caught In between.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: When Axel and the team try to figure out what Sarge Charge's secret weapon is, they get ejected from the house by his newly upgraded security system and must fight their way back inside before Madcap does.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Zoe builds her own battle suit in hopes of joining Axel's team, but learns she cannot shrink. A full-sized Zoe tries to assist Axel and company in a battle against Pyrant and his army of mind-control drones.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Madcap turns to Axel and his team for help after a sonic upgrade to Porcupunk threatens to bring down the house.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Dynamo's attack plunges Axel's bedroom into darkness. Axel and his friends can only rely on Bearbarian, but the latter stays hidden in his lair because he fears the dark.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: After hearing the story of King Arthur, the heroes play at being Knights of the Round Table with Axel in the role of the king. When Axel's sword gets stuck in a stone, he begins to doubt if he really is the right person to lead the Power Players.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: After a new combo-move leaves Masko permanently limp Axel and the team must help the fallen luchador get his stretch back.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Axel and his toys deploy the Joyride in a ship to ship battle against Dr Nautilus, who punctures a water main to flood the sewers and establishes himself as Admiral Nautilus.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Axel juggles between caring for Luka and defending the house against Dr Nautilus' latest abomination, a tentacle monster that attacks the house from all faucets, water pipes and drains.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: When Axel opens a subscription gift-box he didn't even order, the team finds their ranks divided by a robotic bear or Princess SugarSalt in disguise.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: As Zoe preps Cleo LeBall's birthday party, Axel and the team run damage control against jealous crasher Princess SugarSalt, who turns the decorations and gifts into instruments of chaos.
